query: Skydance $400 million investment KKR valuation August 2025

{"query":"Skydance $400 million investment KKR valuation August 2025","model":"mako","response_time_ms":1336,"verdict":null,"extra_info":null,"results":[{"url":"https://skydance.com/news/skydance-media-completes-400-million-funding-round-led-by-new-investor-kkr-values-company-at-over-4-billion/","title":"Skydance Media Completes $400 Million Funding Round Led By New Investor KKR, Values Company At Over $4 Billion - Skydance Media","content":"“The investment from KKR creates a powerful strategic partnership with a firm at the forefront of the evolution of technology and interactive entertainment, all of which are key propellers in the next phase of Skydance growth,” said CEO David Ellison.
KKR assets have included Axel Springer, ByteDance, Chord Music Partners, Epic Games, FanDuel Group, Leonine Studios, Mediawan, OverDrive, PlayOn!
Skydance Television is behind Grace and Frankie, which became Netflix’s longest running series following the release of its final season earlier this year, as well as Foundation, Reacher, Tom Clancy’s Jack Ryan, Condor, The Big Door Prize and an untitled spy series starring Arnold Schwarzenegger in his first ever scripted television series."},{"url":"https://variety.com/2022/film/news/skydance-investment-kkr-redbird-david-ellison-1235402652/","title":"Skydance Lands $400 Million Investment, Bringing Value Past $4 Billion","content":"David Ellison‘s media company Skydance has completed a $400 million investment round, led by global firm KKR and the Ellison family.
Previous investors RedBird Capital and Tencent have also upped their contributions, bringing the total valuation of the producer behind “Top Gun: Maverick” to over $4 billion.
“Skydance has already created a diverse collection of premium content across multiple formats, and we are only in the early stages of what they can accomplish.
We’re proud to be a part of that family,” Ellison said of KKR."},{"url":"https://deadline.com/2022/10/skydance-media-funding-roundr-kkr-david-ellison-redbird-capital-tencent-1235144193/","title":"Skydance Media Completes $400M Funding Round That Values Company At $4B","content":"Successful entertainment franchises include its recent record-setting release of Top Gun: Maverick.
Its slate includes The Greatest Beer Run Ever, the upcoming Ghosted, The Family Plan for Apple TV+; Heart of Stone, The Old Guard 2 and a reboot of the Spy Kids film franchise for Netflix; and the seventh and eighth installments of the Mission: Impossible global franchise."},{"url":"https://www.paulweiss.com/insights/client-news/kkr-leads-investment-round-in-skydance-media","title":"KKR Leads Investment Round in Skydance Media | Paul, Weiss","content":"Paul, Weiss advised KKR as lead investor in a $400 million strategic investment round in Skydance Media.
The fundraise, which values the company at over $4 billion, also included the Ellison family, who remain the company’s majority shareholders, and existing investors RedBird Capital Partners and Tencent.
KKR is investing in Skydance through funds and accounts managed by its Strategic Investments Group."},{"url":"https://www.nasdaq.com/press-release/skydance-media-announces-$400-million-strategic-investment-round-led-by-kkr-and-the","title":"Skydance Media Announces $400 Million Strategic Investment Round Led by KKR and The Ellison Family Plus Existing Investors RedBird Capital Partners and Tencent | Nasdaq","content":"The addition of KKR as a new strategic investor further solidifies Skydance’s position as a leading independent global media company.
The Company first launched with Feature Films and has since strategically expanded to include Television, Interactive, Animation, New Media and Sports, with studios in Los Angeles, Silicon Valley, Spain and Canada.
KKR is a leading global investment firm that offers alternative asset management as well as capital markets and insurance solutions.
Since inception, RedBird has invested in over 30 platform companies and 80 add on acquisitions with total enterprise value exceeding $30 billion.
Media Contacts: For Skydance: Dawn Lach dlach@skydance.com For KKR: Miles Radcliffe-Trenner and Emily Cummings 212-750-8300 media@kkr.com"}]}
